overview: Sanctuary Functional Medicine offers functional and integrative medicine combining natural and conventional approaches to identify and address the root causes of chronic illness.
highlights: Specialized care for mold toxicity and tick-borne infections
Direct Primary Care model combining natural and conventional medicine
Functional medicine evaluation for autoimmune disease, PANS/PANDAS, mast cell activation, and neuroinflammatory conditions
targetAudience: Adults and children with chronic illness seeking root-cause diagnosis and functional medicine treatment.
